info.title: ThePrivateLedger API
info.description: API for managing financial accounts, transactions, and performance metrics.

get.description: Get a list of all accounts with their details.
Get details of a specific account by its ID.
Get performance metrics for all dates.
Get performance metrics for a specific date.
Get all transactions with their details.
Get all transactions for a specific account.
Get metrics of the ledger, including current share price, initial share price, total shares, and total bankroll.

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: The unique identifier of the account, following the format "PL-" followed by 32 hexadecimal characters.

accountBalance.title: Account Balance
accountBalance.description: The balance of the account, representing the total amount of funds available.

currentValue.title: Current Value
currentValue.description: The current value of the account, calculated as account_balance * current_share_price.

sharesOwned.title: Shares Owned
sharesOwned.description: The number of shares owned in the account.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: The ownership percentage of the account.

returnOnInvestment.title: Return On Investment
returnOnInvestment.description: The return on investment for the account.

Account.title: Account
Account.description:
Represents an account.

Attributes:
    account_id: The ID of the account associated with the transaction.
    account_balance: The balance of the account.
    current_value: The current value of the account.
    shares_owned: The number of shares owned in the account.
    ownership: The ownership percentage of the account.
    return_on_investment: Return on investment metrics.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: A list of validation errors encountered during the request.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date of the performance record in YYYY-MM-DD format.

record.title: Record
record.description: A string representing the performance record for that date, formatted as "wins-losses".

returnOnInvestment.title: Return On Investment
returnOnInvestment.description: The return on investment for that date.

shares.title: Shares
shares.description: The number of shares held for that date.

sharePrice.title: Share Price
sharePrice.description: The price per share for that date.

totalBankroll.title: Total Bankroll
totalBankroll.description: The total bankroll for that date.

unitPrice.title: Unit Price
unitPrice.description: The price per unit for that date.

unitsWon.title: Units Won
unitsWon.description: The number of units won on that date.

Performance.title: Performance
Performance.description:
Represents a performance record.

Attributes:
    date: The date of the performance record.
    record: A string representing the performance record.
    return_on_investment: The return on investment for the day.
    shares: The number of shares held.
    share_price: The price per share.
    total_bankroll: The total bankroll for the day.
    unit_price: The price per unit.
    units_won: The number of units won.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date and time of the transaction in ISO 8601 format.

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: The ID of the account associated with the transaction.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of transaction (DEPOSIT or WITHDRAWAL).

shares.title: Shares
shares.description: The number of shares involved in the transaction.

note.title: Note
note.description: The type of note associated with the transaction (e.g., Venmo, Bank Transfer, Check, CashApp, Zelle, Apple Pay).

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description:
Represents a financial transaction.

Attributes:
    date: The date of the transaction.
    account_id: The ID of the account associated with the transaction.
    amount: The amount of the transaction.
    type: The type of the transaction (deposit, withdrawal).
    shares: The number of shares involved in the transaction.
    note: Type of note (Venmo, Bank Transfer, etc.).

loc.title: Location
loc.description: A list indicating where the validation error occurred in the input data.

msg.title: Message
msg.description: A human-readable error message describing the validation error.

input.title: Input
input.description: The input data that caused the validation error.

ctx.title: Context
ctx.description: Additional context for the validation error.

currentSharePrice.title: Current Share Price
currentSharePrice.description: The current price of a share (total_bankroll / total_shares).

initialSharePrice.title: Initial Share Price
initialSharePrice.description: The initial price of a share.

totalShares.title: Total Shares
totalShares.description: The total number of shares owned by all accounts.

totalBankroll.title: Total Bankroll
totalBankroll.description: The total bankroll of the Ledger.

Metrics.title: Metrics
Metrics.description:
Represents metrics of the ledger.

Attributes:
    current_share_price: The current price of a share (total_bankroll / total_shares).
    initial_share_price: The initial price of a share.
    total_shares: The total number of shares owned by all accounts.
    total_bankroll: The total bankroll of the Ledger.
